name: quiz
description: One MCQ quiz per module for belajar-with-rahmanef.com R6 (STATUS #8): instructor builder + member attempt + server-side auto-grade. Correct answers/explanations are stripped from the taking query and revealed only in the graded attempt result (P0). Draft-course quizzes invisible to plain members.
notes: 0.1.0 (2026-07-06, agent gamma): v1.1 scope of STATUS row #8. Standalone builder + take views; the integrator wires them into the course/lesson surfaces (course editor NOT edited — see README integration points). Reads schema tables composed by the integrator from docs/DATA-MODEL.md; no schema writes from this slice.
